nasb.text: All the nations will say, ‘Why has the Lord done thus to this land? Why this great outburst of anger?’

esv.text: all the nations will say, ‘Why has the Lord done thus to this land? What caused the heat of this great anger?’

cnv.text: 看見了這些的人和萬國的人都要問：‘耶和華為甚麼向這地這樣行呢？為甚麼大發烈怒呢？’

ccb.text: 万国必问，‘耶和华为什么要这样对待这地方？祂为什么大发烈怒？’
